notes.scheduling: Managed Agents scheduling API not yet available. Use scripts/trigger_run.sh or external cron.
notes.notion_mcp: Notion MCP auth (static_bearer) was rejected. Agent uses Notion REST API via bash instead.
notes.youtube_transcripts: Blocked from cloud IPs. Agent falls back to RSS descriptions + its own knowledge.
notes.dwarkesh_rss: feeds.buzzsprout.com/2040953.rss returns wrong show. Needs to be updated in Notion.
